Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Action, Or, In The Alternative, Stay Proceedings Pending Individual Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ATCO PEST CONTROL, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss Action, Or, In The Alternative, Stay Proceedings Pending Individual Arbitration.

Defendant Atco Pest Control, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and dismiss action is granted. No opposition filed. The Court will sign the proposed order filed with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported =(302/EPS)
